/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TN:AUNESHA MONROE GANS/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OFALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX:08-19-20 (30TH)/X:60TH DAY IS 09-08-20,/987,2/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BYTHE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THERECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/WEAP/DEF:SHALL NOT CONSUME ANY REGULATED AND OR CONTROLLEDSUBSTANCE WITHOUT A PRESCRIPTION FOR SAME, CAN NOT TRAVEL MORE THAN 50 DRIVING MILES OF SHERIFF'S ELECTRONIC MONITORING OFFICE WITHOUT PRIOR APPROVALOF THE COURT, AND MUST ABIDE BY ANY STAY AWAY ORDER OR OTHER RESTRICTION NOT ON THIS FORM/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA1:NARINDER A/SA2:NARINDERA/SA3:HOUSE OF JEANS, 2304 MISSION STR, SF/SAORD4:25 YARDS/SAORD/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE:2 HOURS WITH CO-DEFT/DOP/
